$schema_note: National buy-box registry — operator-curated source of truth for the market-agnostic deal-math engine. Each market is a CONFIG ROW, not code: any change here flows through the engine with zero rebuild. Flags gate live sourcing: a market is LIVE-FOR-SOURCING only when buyer_params_present AND arv_source_verified AND sourcing_allowed. Restricted states (IL/MO/SC/NC/OK/ND) are sourcing_allowed:false hardcoded — they are STRUCTURALLY UNSOURCEABLE here, so no future change can resurrect them by accident. Non-Detroit metros are DORMANT PLACEHOLDERS (buyer_params_present:false): paste in the BBC row to flip them on.
source: BBC national buy-box table (Detroit row pinned; other rows pending operator paste-in)

markets.label: Detroit, MI

criteria._pending_operator_paste: fill from BBC row: beds_min, baths_min, year_built_min, sqft_min/max, property_types_allowed, max_price_usd, counties (refine)

markets._arv_source_note: FLIPPED true 2026-06-06 ON PROOF: the spread sweep produced a passing renovated-cluster ARV on a real listing — 15875 Strathmoor St (48227): 7 renovated comps @ median $145/sqft (distressed cluster 11 @ $41/sqft), MAD 2.6%, ARV $212,412, MAO $94,805 ≥ list $79,000, spread +$15,805 = PASS. ARV is renovated-cluster median $/sqft × subject sqft from ATTOM recorded MI sales — never AVM, never the arv_uplift 2.0x. Renovated-cluster dispersion bound (≤25% MAD) HOLDs noisy comp sets; missing Est_Rehab HOLDs most listings (hydrate rehab to grow the target list).
